---
title: "Decision Theory"
description: "Expected utility, prospect theory, ambiguity, sequential and group decision-making."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="decision-theory"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Decision Theory</h1>
  <p class="lead">Expected utility, prospect theory, ambiguity, sequential and group decision-making.</p>
</div>
```
